name: ColorFieldProps
description: A color field allows users to edit a hex color or individual color channel value.

onFocus.description: Handler that is called when the element receives focus.

onBlur.description: Handler that is called when the element loses focus.

onFocusChange.description: Handler that is called when the element's focus status changes.

onKeyDown.description: Handler that is called when a key is pressed.

onKeyUp.description: Handler that is called when a key is released.

aria-describedby.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

aria-details.description:
Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the
object.

aria-errormessage.description: Identifies the element that provides an error message for the object.

aria-label.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

aria-labelledby.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

autoFocus.description: Whether the element should receive focus on render.

channel.description:
The color channel that this field edits. If not provided,
the color is edited as a hex value.

children.description:
The children of the component. A function may be provided to alter the children based on
component state.

className.description:
The CSS [className](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Element/className) for the
element. A function may be provided to compute the class based on component state.

colorSpace.description:
The color space that the color field operates in if a `channel` prop is provided.
If no `channel` is provided, the color field always displays the color as an RGB hex value.

excludeFromTabOrder.description:
Whether to exclude the element from the sequential tab order. If true,
the element will not be focusable via the keyboard by tabbing. This should
be avoided except in rare scenarios where an alternative means of accessing
the element or its functionality via the keyboard is available.

form.description:
The `<form>` element to associate the input with.
The value of this attribute must be the id of a `<form>` in the same document.
See [MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Reference/Elements/input#form).

isInvalid.description: Whether the input value is invalid.

isReadOnly.description: Whether the input can be selected but not changed by the user.

isRequired.description: Whether user input is required on the input before form submission.

isWheelDisabled.description: Enables or disables changing the value with scroll.

name.description:
The name of the input element, used when submitting an HTML form. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input#htmlattrdefname).

onBeforeInput.description:
Handler that is called when the input value is about to be modified. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/beforeinput_event).

onChange.description: Handler that is called when the value changes.

onCompositionEnd.description:
Handler that is called when a text composition system completes or cancels the current text
composition session. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Element/compositionend_event).

onCompositionStart.description:
Handler that is called when a text composition system starts a new text composition session.
See [MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Element/compositionstart_event).

onCompositionUpdate.description:
Handler that is called when a new character is received in the current text composition
session. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Element/compositionupdate_event).

onCopy.description:
Handler that is called when the user copies text. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/oncopy).

onCut.description:
Handler that is called when the user cuts text. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/oncut).

onInput.description:
Handler that is called when the input value is modified. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/input_event).

onPaste.description:
Handler that is called when the user pastes text. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/onpaste).

onSelect.description:
Handler that is called when text in the input is selected. See
[MDN](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Element/select_event).

render.description:
Overrides the default DOM element with a custom render function.
This allows rendering existing components with built-in styles and behaviors
such as router links, animation libraries, and pre-styled components.

Requirements:

- You must render the expected element type (e.g. if `<button>` is expected, you cannot render an
  `<a>`).
- Only a single root DOM element can be rendered (no fragments).
- You must pass through props and ref to the underlying DOM element, merging with your own prop
  as appropriate.

slot.description:
A slot name for the component. Slots allow the component to receive props from a parent
component. An explicit `null` value indicates that the local props completely override all
props received from a parent.

style.description:
The inline [style](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/style) for the
element. A function may be provided to compute the style based on component state.

validate.type: ((value: Color | null) => true | ValidationError | null | undefined)
validate.detailedType:
| ((
    value: Color | null,
  ) => true | ValidationError | null | undefined)
| undefined
validate.description:
A function that returns an error message if a given value is invalid.
Validation errors are displayed to the user when the form is submitted
if `validationBehavior="native"`. For realtime validation, use the `isInvalid`
prop instead.

validationBehavior.description:
Whether to use native HTML form validation to prevent form submission
when the value is missing or invalid, or mark the field as required
or invalid via ARIA.

channel.description: The color channel that this field edits, or "hex" if no `channel` prop is set.

isDisabled.description: Whether the color field is disabled.

isInvalid.description: Whether the color field is invalid.

isReadOnly.description: Whether the color field is read only.

isRequired.description: Whether the color field is required.

channel.name: channel
channel.description: The color channel that this field edits, or "hex" if no `channel` prop is set.

isDisabled.name: isDisabled
isDisabled.description: Whether the color field is disabled.

isInvalid.name: isInvalid
isInvalid.description: Whether the color field is invalid.

isReadOnly.name: isReadOnly
isReadOnly.description: Whether the color field is read only.

isRequired.name: isRequired
isRequired.description: Whether the color field is required.

channel.name: channel
channel.description: The color channel that this field edits, or "hex" if no `channel` prop is set.

isDisabled.name: isDisabled
isDisabled.description: Whether the color field is disabled.

isInvalid.name: isInvalid
isInvalid.description: Whether the color field is invalid.

isReadOnly.name: isReadOnly
isReadOnly.description: Whether the color field is read only.

isRequired.name: isRequired
isRequired.description: Whether the color field is required.

clone.name: clone
clone.description: Returns a duplicate of the color value.

formatChannelValue.name: formatChannelValue
formatChannelValue.description: Formats the numeric value for a given channel for display according to the provided locale.

getChannelFormatOptions.name: getChannelFormatOptions
getChannelFormatOptions.description: Returns the number formatting options for the given channel.

getChannelName.name: getChannelName
getChannelName.description:
Returns a localized color channel name for a given channel and locale,
for use in visual or accessibility labels.

getChannelRange.name: getChannelRange
getChannelRange.description: Returns the minimum, maximum, and step values for a given channel.

getChannelValue.name: getChannelValue
getChannelValue.description:
Returns the numeric value for a given channel.
Throws an error if the channel is unsupported in the current color format.

getColorChannels.name: getColorChannels
getColorChannels.description: Returns an array of the color channels within the current color space space.

getColorName.name: getColorName
getColorName.description: Returns a localized name for the color, for use in visual or accessibility labels.

getColorSpace.name: getColorSpace
getColorSpace.description: Returns the color space, 'rgb', 'hsb' or 'hsl', for the current color.

getColorSpaceAxes.name: getColorSpaceAxes
getColorSpaceAxes.description: Returns the color space axes, xChannel, yChannel, zChannel.

getHueName.name: getHueName
getHueName.description: Returns a localized name for the hue, for use in visual or accessibility labels.

toFormat.name: toFormat
toFormat.description: Converts the color to the given color format, and returns a new Color object.

toHexInt.name: toHexInt
toHexInt.description: Converts the color to hex, and returns an integer representation.

toString.name: toString
toString.description: Converts the color to a string in the given format.

withChannelValue.name: withChannelValue
withChannelValue.description:
Sets the numeric value for a given channel, and returns a new Color object.
Throws an error if the channel is unsupported in the current color format.

maxValue.name: maxValue
maxValue.description: The maximum value of the color channel.

minValue.name: minValue
minValue.description: The minimum value of the color channel.

pageSize.name: pageSize
pageSize.description: The page step value of the color channel, used when incrementing and decrementing.

step.name: step
step.description: The step value of the color channel, used when incrementing and decrementing.
